text.title: Customer Support Ops Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Customer Support Ops end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: audit-tickets
step.action: Cluster tickets by topic + plan; compute frequency + cost.

step.name: ship-self-serve
step.action: Write FAQ + KB articles before opening async channel.

step.name: set-tiered-sla
step.action: Set SLA per tier; publish on website + plan emails.

step.name: build-canned-replies
step.action: Author canned replies covering ≥60% of repeats.

step.name: schedule-weekly-review
step.action: Weekly review of top-5 patterns into FAQ + roadmap.
